requirement_topic.en: EMC (IEC 62920 and IEC 61000) for Luxembourg PV Inverters

summary.en: Luxembourg adopts EU harmonised EMC standards under EMC Directive 2014/30/EU. PV inverters must comply with IEC 62920 (PV power conversion EMC — emissions and immunity), IEC 61000 series (harmonics IEC 61000-3-2/-3, surge immunity IEC 61000-4-5, voltage dip immunity IEC 61000-4-11), and Creos power-quality requirements. Tests must be performed at 230/400 V 50 Hz configuration. ILNAS adopts EN/IEC standards.
summary.zh: 卢森堡依据EMC指令2014/30/EU采用欧盟协调EMC标准。光伏逆变器须符合IEC 62920（光伏电力转换EMC——发射和抗扰度）、IEC 61000系列（谐波IEC 61000-3-2/-3、浪涌抗扰度IEC 61000-4-5、电压跌落抗扰度IEC 61000-4-11）及Creos电能质量要求。测试须在230/400 V 50 Hz配置下进行。ILNAS采用EN/IEC标准。
summary.zht: 盧森堡依據EMC指令2014/30/EU採用歐盟協調EMC標準。光伏逆變器須符合IEC 62920（光伏電力轉換EMC——發射和抗擾度）、IEC 61000系列（諧波IEC 61000-3-2/-3、浪湧抗擾度IEC 61000-4-5、電壓跌落抗擾度IEC 61000-4-11）及Creos電能品質要求。測試須在230/400 V 50 Hz配置下進行。ILNAS採用EN/IEC標準。

summary.en: GB/T 37408-2021 covers EMC requirements for Chinese PV inverters. CNAS-accredited domestic EMC reports are issued. Tests are performed at 220/380 V 50 Hz. Chinese EMC certificates are not accepted as EU equivalent.
summary.zh: GB/T 37408-2021涵盖中国光伏逆变器的EMC要求。国内CNAS认可实验室出具EMC报告。测试在220/380 V 50 Hz下进行。中国EMC证书不被视为欧盟等效证书。
summary.zht: GB/T 37408-2021涵蓋中國光伏逆變器的EMC要求。國內CNAS認可實驗室出具EMC報告。測試在220/380 V 50 Hz下進行。中國EMC證書不被視為歐盟等效證書。

gap.en: China-only GB/T 37408 EMC certificates do not satisfy Luxembourg/EU EMC Directive requirements. Tests performed at 220/380 V are not directly substitutable for 230/400 V Luxembourg configuration — surge, earthing, shielding, and enclosure documentation must be reviewed. EU DoC and EN-standard EMC test reports required.
gap.zh: 仅适用于中国的GB/T 37408 EMC证书不满足卢森堡/欧盟EMC指令要求。在220/380 V下进行的测试不能直接替代230/400 V卢森堡配置的测试——须审查浪涌、接地、屏蔽和外壳文件。须提供欧盟DoC和EN标准EMC测试报告。
gap.zht: 僅適用於中國的GB/T 37408 EMC證書不滿足盧森堡/歐盟EMC指令要求。在220/380 V下進行的測試不能直接替代230/400 V盧森堡配置的測試——須審查浪湧、接地、屏蔽和外殼文件。須提供歐盟DoC和EN標準EMC測試報告。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — EMC Directive CE marking required for Luxembourg/EU market
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 37408-2021 mandatory for grid-connected PV inverters in China

source.publisher: ILNAS — Luxembourg Institute for Standardisation, Accreditation, Safety and Metrology

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T 37408 EMC reports do not satisfy EU EMC Directive 2014/30/EU requirements for Luxembourg. New EMC testing at 230/400 V 50 Hz per IEC 62920 and IEC 61000 series is required, along with EU DoC.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T 37408 EMC报告不满足卢森堡EU EMC指令2014/30/EU的要求。须依据IEC 62920和IEC 61000系列在230/400 V 50 Hz下重新进行EMC测试，并提供欧盟DoC。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T 37408 EMC報告不滿足盧森堡EU EMC指令2014/30/EU的要求。須依據IEC 62920和IEC 61000系列在230/400 V 50 Hz下重新進行EMC測試，並提供歐盟DoC。
